name: pizza-express
description: This repository contains the completed Sprint 7 MVP for the Express Pizza system. It includes a fully integrated Node.js API, Prisma ORM over PostgreSQL, WebSockets for KDS, and robust vanilla JS frontends.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -r index.html admin.html kds.html pos.html order-success.html oferta.html css js images dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
